packageRules.description: Automerge minor/patch for stable Rust deps after cooldown
Never automerge GitHub Actions — require human review

Pin rand + rand_chacha to 0.9.x — see Cargo.toml comment. rand 0.10 only promises stream stability for StdRng, not ChaCha8Rng (now a re-export from `chacha20` under a `chacha` feature), and renamed `choose_multiple` → `sample`. Either change would silently shift the seeded draws we rely on for deterministic snapshot tests and agent-cacheable output. Renovate doesn't read .github/dependabot.yml, so this needs a separate rule here.
